stemHtml: What will be the effect of an incorrect cruise level entry into the FMC?

options.a: The FMC will calculate incorrect speeds, times and fuel flows.
options.b: The incorrect entry will be detected and the input will be prevented.
options.c: The aircraft will NOT be able to reach the ATC assigned cruise level.
options.d: There will be NO effect as the FMC will make an automatic correction.
